data.body: Write the protocol down as the source of truth for interactive agent integrations. The design should capture: declared agent capabilities; startup handshake; prompt delivery mode; normalized stream-event contract; how a turn-complete signal differs from a step-complete signal; how follow-up prompts are sent in-session; when stdin is closed; how wrapper code waits for process exit; how post-exit backend state validation determines workflow success; and how inactivity watchdogs, retries, and aborts work across agents. Prefer a markdown design artifact under the repo so later implementations target the same contract.
data.title: Document the interactive agent session protocol
